title: Compliance with ADA
doc_html:
§1744.  Compliance with ADA

Nothing in this Part shall be construed to relieve any person of his responsibility to comply with the ADA.

Added by Acts 1977, No. 625, §1.  Acts 1995, No. 880, §1.

§1744.  Compliance with ADA
Nothing in this Part shall be construed to relieve any person of his responsibility to comply with the ADA.
Added by Acts 1977, No. 625, §1.  Acts 1995, No. 880, §1.
